_comment: Category bands on the 0-100 score (REFACTOR_SPEC §5.4). Naive defaults; calibration would re-fit these where the historical conversion rate scales (docs/calibration.md). 'invalid' is NOT a band: it comes from the gate / looks_invalid. 'warm_high' is the value cutoff (near the hot threshold) above which a complete warm lead is treated as automation-worthy and the agent attempts the booking proactively (src/action/decision.py route_complete); also naive/calibratable.
